title: Phantasmal Gardener
move_pattern: Move pattern depends on slot position. Starting move: Flail (slot 1) / Bite (slot 2) / Lash (slot 3) / Enlarge (slot 4). After initial move, cycles: Bite → Lash → Flail → Enlarge → Bite
notes: Each time Enlarge is used, the monster's scale increases based on logarithmic growth: CurrentScale = 1 + 0.1 × ln(EnlargeTriggers + 1). This affects its visual presentation and may impact hit detection. The monster starts with a different first move depending on which creature slot it occupies (first, second, third, or fourth), but always follows the same four-move cycle afterward.
